morocco.statusLabel: Qualified for the quarter-finals · next challenge: France
morocco.heroSubtitle: The Atlas Lions are in the quarter-finals after Canada 0–3 Morocco. Next step: an epic clash with France.

france.selectorLine: Quatrième du Mondial · une sortie folle face à l’Angleterre
france.tagline: Les Bleus quittent le Mondial au terme d’un match d’anthologie
france.heroSubtitle: Menée 4–0 à la pause, la France a signé une remontée spectaculaire avant de s’incliner 6–4 face à l’Angleterre.

brazil.statusLabel: Eliminated in the Round of 16 · Norway 2–1 Brazil
brazil.selectorLine: Eliminated · Neymar scored in his last World Cup
brazil.heroSubtitle: Neymar scored one last time, but the Seleção leave the stage.

norway.statusLabel: Qualified for the quarter-finals · next challenge: England
norway.heroSubtitle: Norway knocked out Brazil and now meets England in Miami.

spain.tagline: La Roja conquer their second star
spain.heroSubtitle: Spain are world champions after defeating Argentina 1–0 in the final.

egypt.statusLabel: Eliminated in the Round of 16 · Argentina 3–2 Egypt
egypt.selectorLine: Eliminated in the Round of 16 · huge regrets

belgium.statusLabel: Qualified for the Round of 16 · next: United States

england.statusLabel: World Cup bronze medallists · France 4–6 England
england.selectorLine: Third in the world · bronze after a ten-goal classic
england.tagline: The Three Lions finish third in the world
england.heroSubtitle: England beat France 6–4 in a remarkable bronze final and leave the World Cup with a medal.

argentina.tagline: A legendary run ends with silver
argentina.heroSubtitle: Argentina finish as world runners-up after a narrow 1–0 defeat to Spain.

switzerland.statusLabel: Qualified for the quarter-finals · next challenge: Argentina
switzerland.heroSubtitle: Switzerland held their nerve on penalties and now face Argentina.
